HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Ellen Liu Gee's motion to modify or quash deposition subpoena is granted in part. The subpoena is modified to only require production of records from January 3, 2002 to March 3, 2004. The names of persons other than Heiping Shen aka Zhu, Ellen Liu Kun Gee, Shen's Health Center Inc. may be redacted.

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Travi Khuong's motion to compel the attendance of defendant Shen at deposition is Granted.
